subject: Charmander, the small orange lizard Pokémon with a flame-tipped tail, standing in a bamboo or dense forest clearing
description: A small, upright orange lizard Pokémon stands in the foreground of a warm, orange-lit forest or bamboo grove. The creature has a rounded belly, stubby limbs, and a tail ending in a visible flame. The background is filled with tall vertical plant stalks bathed in warm amber and orange light, creating a glowing, dense-canopy atmosphere. The posture is alert and forward-facing.
foreground: small orange lizard Pokémon standing upright with flame tail
background: dense bamboo or forest stalks in warm amber light
